title: Debate Over Ancient Iranian Jewelry Worn by Zendaya to ‘Odyssey’ Event
summary_full: The actress wore earrings to an event for “The Odyssey” that a London gallery has said were made from an ancient artifact.
summary_public: The actress wore earrings to an event for “The Odyssey” that a London gallery has said were made from an ancient artifact.
